name: Extract file(s) from a pre-deletion container
description: An examination of the operating system structures that represent the 'pre-deletion' container (i.e. Recycle Bin/Trash) to extract those files and potentially additional metadata such as original path or date it was moved.
details:
Content in pre-deletion containers such as the recycle bin/trash is not always viewable in a useful form without further processing. 
This further processing should provide access to the file content but also potentially additional information such as data sent to recycle bin, or original path.
